title: Alibaba workforce shrinks 34% in 2025 as Chinese tech giant doubles down on AI
summary_full: Alibaba cut its staff by roughly 34% over the course of 2025, as the company disposed of peripheral holdings to focus on its AI business.
summary_public: Alibaba cut its staff by roughly 34% over the course of 2025, as the company disposed of peripheral holdings to focus on its AI business.
